compiled_state.title: RED: Test close benchmark under 10s with 200 tickets
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh for close operation benchmarking:
- test_close_benchmark_under_threshold: Create tracker with 200 non-archived tickets + 50 archived tickets (mix of epic/story/task types, open/in_progress/closed statuses, dependency links between some), create one target task ticket in open status (no children), time the full 'ticket transition <target> open closed' CLI command (which internally runs open-children check + ticket-unblock.py), assert wall-clock < 10s.
- test_close_benchmark_realistic_population: Verify the seeded population contains a realistic mix — at least 3 ticket types, at least 2 statuses, at least 10 dependency links. This is a setup validation test, not a performance test.

**Timed operation**: The full ticket transition <id> open closed CLI command — this is the user-observable wall-clock time and includes ALL internal operations (open-children guard, flock, STATUS event write, ticket-unblock.py subprocess).

**Target ticket preconditions**: The target ticket must be a task in open status with no children — the simplest closeable state. This avoids conflating benchmark failures with close-guard rejections.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh (add test functions)
- .test-index (add RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
test_close_benchmark_under_threshold fails because ticket-benchmark.sh has no --mode=close option yet.

### Test approach
Use existing _seed_tickets helper extended to create mixed types and add dependency links. Use bash time measurement (date +%s.%N before/after) around the ticket transition call. Assert elapsed < 10.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (excluding RED-marked tests)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_close_benchmark_under_threshold exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_close_benchmark_under_threshold' tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh
- [ ] test_close_benchmark_realistic_population exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_close_benchmark_realistic_population' tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-benchmark.sh.*test-ticket-benchmark.sh.*test_close_benchmark' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED benchmark tests for close under 10s
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
